{# /species-grid #} {# ── Final disclaimer — single instance, after all species, never mid-document ── #}
A note on safety and sources

Edibility and medicinal information in this booklet is for educational reference only. Always verify identification with multiple authoritative sources before consuming any wild plant or fungi. Never rely on any single source, including this booklet, as your sole basis for a consumption decision. Identification and content may be AI-assisted. Human-created and/or reviewed content is indicated where shown. ForagingID is an educational tool, not a safety-certified identification system.

{# /content #}
